notes: This file stores SHARE COUNTS and COST BASIS PER SHARE, not dollar market values.
Current market value and concentration % are computed at read time by the routine using live prices, so this file only needs to change when you actually buy, sell, or add cash.
Fill in your real Fidelity holdings and cash balance before first use. Delete the EXAMPLE_TICKER entry.
Never store account numbers, login credentials, or tax IDs in this file.
This file is only ever updated from your actual brokerage data or an explicit statement from you. The routine must never estimate or auto-write to this file from market-price movement.
